name: House Cosmouth

street_level_faction_presence.street_signals: Symbols, uniform cues, work marks, and rumor shorthand make power visible in daily movement.

greetings: Harbor greetings, deck etiquette, and commercial courtesy mix with archival formality.
hospitality_rules: Hosts often offer view, drink, and news together; information is part of the welcome.
taboo_topics: careless talk that jeopardizes shipping security or treasury trust
class_expectations: shipwrights, sailors, clerks, and archivists all carry status through skill rather than plain display
faith_etiquette: shore shrines and departure blessings matter most before voyages and storms
suspicious_behavior: lingering near treasury or shipwright controls
outsider_mistakes: assuming maritime ease means weak oversight

occupation_and_daily_life.daily_rhythm: Life turns on tides, docking, repairs, recordkeeping, tax or treasury duty, and the constant trade between shore and floating civic space.
occupation_and_daily_life.work_rhythm_by_calendar_or_season: Storm periods and sea conditions reorder everything from wages to sleep.
occupation_and_daily_life.ordinary_texture: Salt, rope tar, wet wood, fish, ink, kelp, and hammered fittings define the sensory field. Voices rise and fall with loading calls and weather alarms.

travel_and_transition_texture: Travel through Cosmouth means inspections, tide timing, deck hierarchy, and constant weather-reading.
dwelling_and_settlement_life: Homes prioritize humidity-resistant storage, shared meals, berth logic, and guest customs shaped by sea schedules.
relationship_and_reputation_logic: People are remembered for whether they keep account, keep cargo safe, and keep their word when storms hit.
region_specific_emotional_tone: Cosmouth stories lean toward maritime uncertainty, layered loyalties, ledger tension, long memory, and the intimacy of life built around movement and weather.
